# ONNX Runtime GenAI

Run SLMs/LLMs and multi-modal models on-device and in the cloud with ONNX Runtime.

For more details, see: docs https://onnxruntime.ai/docs/genai and repo: https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime-genai
